content_body: Christmas Celebration. Made wonderful dinners, drank delicious drinks, watched movies, played cards, walked to river, took train ride and toured downtown Blue Ridge. Rolling River Cabin was just beautiful! Gary Knight was so nice and very informative.  When we walked in, a beautifully decorated tree was there to greet us ~ what a perfect Christmas. Thanks to Gary and Lissa for making this so special for our family. We will definitely be back again.
title: Christmas Celebration in Blue Ridge
